task_name: add Mistral Instruct v3 chat template

details.reasoning: Partial implementation with significant formatting issues. Correctly adds the static function, template auto-detection with [SYSTEM_PROMPT] absence check, LOG_DBG call, and handler dispatch. However, critical failures: (1) Uses COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_PEG_NATIVE instead of required COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_CONTENT_ONLY; (2) No explicit wrapping of user turns with [INST]/[/INST] markers - relies on template application without handler-level wrapping; (3) No visible system message prepending logic to first user turn; (4) No explicit </s> token appending after assistant turns. The parser structure with tool_calls and json_schema handling suggests a different design than the simple instruct format specified. Core chat formatting requirements are unmet.
